New Terminal Output:

}user@c32c98d583c3:~/migration$ cat remove_packages.sh
#!/bin/bash

# Container package removal script
# Generated by migration audit

# This will remove 19 packages and free approximately 37114 KB

echo 'The following packages will be removed:'
echo ''
echo '  - apache2'
echo '  - dnsutils'
echo '  - git'
echo '  - htop'
echo '  - iputils-ping'
echo '  - lsof'
echo '  - mysql-client'
echo '  - nano'
echo '  - ncdu'
echo '  - netcat-openbsd'
echo '  - nodejs'
echo '  - npm'
echo '  - postgresql-client'
echo '  - redis-tools'
echo '  - strace'
echo '  - tcpdump'
echo '  - tree'
echo '  - vim'
echo '  - wget'
echo ''
echo 'Dry run: apt-get remove -y \'
echo '  apache2 \'
echo '  dnsutils \'
echo '  git \'
echo '  htop \'
echo '  iputils-ping \'
echo '  lsof \'
echo '  mysql-client \'
echo '  nano \'
echo '  ncdu \'
echo '  netcat-openbsd \'
echo '  nodejs \'
echo '  npm \'
echo '  postgresql-client \'
echo '  redis-tools \'
echo '  strace \'
echo '  tcpdump \'
echo '  tree \'
echo '  vim \'
echo '  wget'
echo ''
echo 'Uncomment the line below to actually remove packages:'
# apt-get remove -y apache2 dnsutils git htop iputils-ping lsof mysql-client nano ncdu netcat-openbsd nodejs npm postgresql-client redis-tools strace tcpdump tr
ee vim wget
